# GearSlotRef constructor

One equipped item from social data: which item-config id occupies which slot (no instance rolls — social data carries slot+id only).

```csharp
public GearSlotRef(int Slot, int EquipId)
```

| parameter | description |
| --- | --- |
| Slot | Equipment slot code (wire `EquipNine.slot`). |
| EquipId | Item-config id occupying the slot (resolves name/quality/icon via the item table). |
